name: EBV Phenology Finland — detailed raster-cell crop
description: Full-resolution 50 × 50 raster-cell crop generated from the original NetCDF. Each feature is one valid raster cell for coniferous forest in 2001. This is intended as a detailed but manageable Building Blocks Feature View example.
algorithm: VAP derived from Fractional Snow Cover time series
